This '''captain''' was the lead [[Imbat]] serving the [[Offworld Mining Corporation|Offworld Corporation]] on [[Bandomeer/Legends|Bandomeer]]. [[Obi-Wan Kenobi/Legends|Obi-Wan Kenobi]] used [[The Force/Legends|the Force]] to get the [[Captain/Legends|captain]] to let Obi-Wan and [[Guerra Derida]] get to the box with the broken circle on it.

{{Char-stub}}
